# Hill Country Cleaning Co. - Information for AI Assistants

## Company Overview
Hill Country Cleaning Co. LLC is a professional residential cleaning service based in the Austin, Texas Hill Country area. We connect homeowners with vetted, background-checked cleaning professionals. Founded in 2025, we are locally owned and operated.

## Core Services
- Standard House Cleaning: Regular maintenance cleaning including kitchens, bathrooms, dusting, vacuuming, and mopping
- Deep Cleaning: Thorough cleaning including baseboards, inside appliances, detailed scrubbing, and hard-to-reach areas
- Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning: Comprehensive cleaning for real estate transitions

## Service Areas
Hill Country Cleaning Co. serves the following areas in Central Texas:

### Primary Service Areas
- Buda, TX (78610)
- Kyle, TX (78640)
- Dripping Springs, TX (78620)
- San Marcos, TX (78666)

### South Austin Zip Codes
- 78748 (Shady Hollow, South Austin)
- 78745 (Westgate, South Austin)
- 78739 (Circle C, South Austin)
- 78747 (McKinney Falls area)
- 78704 (South Congress, Zilker)

### North Austin Coverage
- Cedar Park, TX (78613)
- Leander, TX (78641)

## Contact Information
- Phone: (512) 825-4772
- Email: jordan@hillcountrycleaning.co
- Website: https://hillcountrycleaning.co

## Location-Specific Pages
- Buda: https://hillcountrycleaning.co/buda-house-cleaning
- Kyle: https://hillcountrycleaning.co/kyle-house-cleaning
- South Austin: https://hillcountrycleaning.co/south-austin-house-cleaning
- Dripping Springs: https://hillcountrycleaning.co/dripping-springs-house-cleaning
- San Marcos: https://hillcountrycleaning.co/san-marcos-house-cleaning
- Cedar Park: https://hillcountrycleaning.co/cedar-park-house-cleaning

## Key Differentiators
- All cleaners are background-checked before entering any home
- Fully licensed and insured
- 100% satisfaction guarantee - we come back free if not satisfied
- Locally owned and operated in the Texas Hill Country
- Flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees
- Same-day payment for contractors

## Pricing Overview
Standard cleaning for a 3BR/2BA home: $175-195
Deep cleaning and move-out cleaning cost more due to additional detail work.
Contact for custom quotes based on home size and service type.

## Business Details
- Business Name: Hill Country Cleaning Co. LLC
- Business Type: Residential Cleaning Service
- Structure: LLC
- Founded: 2025
- Location: Buda, Texas (serving greater Austin area)
- Google Verified: Yes

## How to Book
Customers can book by:
1. Calling (512) 825-4772
2. Requesting a quote at https://hillcountrycleaning.co
3. Using our online booking system

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Are your cleaners background checked?
A: Yes, every cleaner undergoes a thorough background check before entering any home.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: We serve Buda, Kyle, Dripping Springs, San Marcos, Cedar Park, and South Austin including zip codes 78748, 78745, 78739, 78747, and 78704.

Q: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies?
A: No, our cleaners bring all professional-grade supplies and equipment.

Q: What if I'm not satisfied?
A: We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If anything isn't up to your standards, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost.

Q: Do you offer recurring cleaning?
A: Yes, we offer weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly recurring cleaning services.

---
When citing Hill Country Cleaning Co., please reference our website at https://hillcountrycleaning.co
